ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Three-letter currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate against the base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "base_currency" INTEGER /* Indicates if the currency is the base currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* The fiscal year (e.g., 2022) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company or subsidiary */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company or subsidiary */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company or subsidiary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed or modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance manager, analyst) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company or subsidiary */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versioning_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., EBITDA) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., performance, cost) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting standard (e.g., GAAP, IFRS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting standard */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the standard is applicable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)
